title: Codex PreToolUse Hook Input
description: Stdin JSON payload delivered to PreToolUse hooks by Codex. Based on official Codex hooks documentation.

hook_event_name.description: Always present in Codex — identifies the hook event type.

model.description: The model being used (always present in Codex).

permission_mode.description: The permission mode Codex is running in.

transcript_path.description: Path to the session transcript (may be null in Codex).

cwd.description: Working directory of the Codex agent.

turn_id.description: Identifier for the current conversation turn.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being invoked (e.g. 'Bash', 'apply_patch').

tool_use_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific tool use instance.

tool_input.description: The tool's input arguments. May be object or any JSON value.
